title: Fix invisible highlights and menus in PDF fullscreen (dbg101)
description:
In the fullscreen PDF viewer, highlights saved to state but did not appear on screen, the color-selection popup was missing, and the right-click sheet menu seemed broken.

Root causes: (1) context menu and color HUD used z-index 2000–2600 while the fullscreen shell is z-index 9200, so menus opened behind the workspace. (2) continuous viewer pages kept map-board world x/y coordinates while rendering as a vertical stack, so highlight ink coordinates were off-canvas.

dbg101 raises menu/HUD z-index above fullscreen, normalizes viewer page stack layout (p.x=0, p.y=stacked), and keeps overlays in sync on zoom.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen.
changeLog: Raise context menu and color HUD z-index above fullscreen overlay.
Normalize continuous viewer page x/y to vertical stack layout for highlight coords.
Store pageId on line-tool first click; improve line preview targeting.
Refresh highlight overlays after zoom with correct page layout.
